replies.msg:
跟個人喜好

呢件事 200% 合法呀～
幫你再推

拋磚引玉，希望大家討論吓不同意見既成效

1. 短期內舉辦光復元朗行動

2. 搜集任何相關資料，包括但不限有關人仕個人資料，相關物業/店舖資料，活躍地點，行蹤等等

3. 透過警方，食環等等相關部門，清洗元朗黃賭毒產業鏈 ，烏煙瘴氣好多巴打覺得警黑合作，成效不大

4. 眾籌去聘請例如G4S等國際保安公司，保護各議員，知名人仕如陳伯，記者們，其他有需要市民等等

5. 元朗放盤/退租，警黑合作，治安全無

6. 舉報僭建

7. 全民對抗新鴻基SHK運動

[集思廣益]發夢夢到殲滅元朗官商鄉黑計劃

就昨夜何君堯在元朗檢閱及表揚白衫黑社會向途人施襲，我方律師草擬了一封投訴信，要求律師會嚴肅處理何君堯無視法紀，及違反律師守則和操守一事。

大家只需要郵寄以下信件去律師會，不用填寫任何個人資料，量足夠多就是了。

這個投訴在任何地方都可以做，請大家廣傳。

//BY POST

The Law Society of Hong Kong
3rd Floor, Wing On House
71 Des Voeux Road Central

Hong Kong

Dear Sirs

Re: Complaint against Ho Kwan Yiu of Messrs. K.C. Ho & Fong

I am a citizen of Hong Kong.

Although I hold dear the civil rights of every citizen, the video footage widely spread on the news and the social media showing the interaction between Mr. Ho Kwan Yiu and a few men in white (with red ribbon on the wrist holding sticks) on 21st July 2019 shortly after the brutal attack happened in Yuen Long does call for an investigation into Mr. Ho, in particular, whether he was participated in the brutal attack in Yuen Long in any way.

Furthermore, the widely spread photo taken by Mr. Ho himself within the Court building also calls for an investigation if not a reprimand against Mr. Ho’s behaviour who is not only the officer of the Court but also a member of the Law Society of Hong Kong and has blatantly ignoring the law and wilfully putting himself above the law.

I shall be very grateful if this esteemed society will take this complaint seriously.



Yours faithfully



A Citizen

quote.msg: 萬眾一心 dq何妖 !

Chung-Tai Cheng 鄭松泰

就昨夜何君堯在元朗檢閱及表揚白衫黑社會向途人施襲，我方律師草擬了一封投訴信，要求律師會嚴肅處理何君堯無視法紀，及違反律師守則和操守一事。

大家只需要郵寄以下信件去律師會，不用填寫任何個人資料，量足夠多就是了。

這個投訴在任何地方都可以做，請大家廣傳。

//BY POST

The Law Society of Hong Kong
3rd Floor, Wing On House
71 Des Voeux Road Central

Hong Kong

Dear Sirs

Re: Complaint against Ho Kwan Yiu of Messrs. K.C. Ho & Fong

I am a citizen of Hong Kong.

Although I hold dear the civil rights of every citizen, the video footage widely spread on the news and the social media showing the interaction between Mr. Ho Kwan Yiu and a few men in white (with red ribbon on the wrist holding sticks) on 21st July 2019 shortly after the brutal attack happened in Yuen Long does call for an investigation into Mr. Ho, in particular, whether he was participated in the brutal attack in Yuen Long in any way.

Furthermore, the widely spread photo taken by Mr. Ho himself within the Court building also calls for an investigation if not a reprimand against Mr. Ho’s behaviour who is not only the officer of the Court but also a member of the Law Society of Hong Kong and has blatantly ignoring the law and wilfully putting himself above the law.

I shall be very grateful if this esteemed society will take this complaint seriously.



Yours faithfully



A Citizen

quote.msg:
拋磚引玉，希望大家討論吓不同意見既成效

1. 短期內舉辦光復元朗行動

2. 搜集任何相關資料，包括但不限有關人仕個人資料，相關物業/店舖資料，活躍地點，行蹤等等

3. 透過警方，食環等等相關部門，清洗元朗黃賭毒產業鏈 ，烏煙瘴氣好多巴打覺得警黑合作，成效不大

4. 眾籌去聘請例如G4S等國際保安公司，保護各議員，知名人仕如陳伯，記者們，其他有需要市民等等

5. 元朗放盤/退租，警黑合作，治安全無

6. 舉報僭建

7. 全民對抗新鴻基SHK運動

page 5, 簽名

721體現警黑合作，香港真面目。
黑警港島三十幾槍，黑社會元朗亂鳩打人。


光復香港，時代革命！

—————————————— 八大訴求 ——————————————
一、徹底撤回修例
二、收回暴動定義
三、撤銷對今為所有反送中抗爭者控罪
四、徹底追究警隊濫權情況
五、以行政命令解散立法會，立即實行雙真普選
六、要求永不落實「社會信用評分系統」
七、要求移除全港「多功能智慧燈柱」
八、追究元朗鄉黑暴徒及警察失蹤

replies.msg:
多謝巴打。

少許意見:

1. 發夢夢見好多人去信, 律師會 email box 已爆, 跟住d人去咗郵寄或者by hand

2. email template 第9-12段, Principle 1.02 應為 Principle 1.03
(https://www.hklawsoc.org.hk/pub_e/professionalguide/volume1/default.asp?cap=1.1.3)
麻煩未寄出投訴信既巴絲自行修改。
